lines.speaker: Halla
lines.text: Welcome to Miscellania's first clothing store! We sell clothing made especially for Fremenniks and Dwarves.

lines.speaker: Halla
lines.text: Can I help you with anything, Your Royal Highness?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to look at what you have for sale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it like living down here?

lines.speaker: Halla
lines.text: It's very spacious down here. One of the dwarves said that the caves go on for miles!

lines.speaker: Halla
lines.text: The only problem I find is that the lighting's not very good, which means I make mistakes when cutting cloth.

lines.speaker: Halla
lines.text: Welcome to Miscellania's first clothing store! We sell clothing made especially for Fremenniks and Dwarves.

lines.speaker: Halla
lines.text: Can I help you with anything, Your Royal Highness?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it like living down here?

lines.speaker: Halla
lines.text: It's very spacious. One of the dwarves said that the caves go on for miles!

lines.speaker: Halla
lines.text: I don't like these rumours I've heard about the other caves, though.

lines.speaker: Halla
lines.text: They say there might be monsters in there. You'd best talk to the dwarves who are excavating - they'd know about these stories.
